scripts.setup: node --version && npm --version && npm run pkg-age-check && npm ci && npm audit signatures && npm run prepare
scripts.npm-reinstall: node --version && npm --version && npm run pkg-age-check && rm -rf node_modules && npm cache clean --force && npm ci && npm audit signatures && npm run prepare && npm audit fix && node ./tools/check-package-age.js --transitive && npm outdated
